empathetic_output.support_response: Can you tell me more about what happened after you updated your drivers last week? Any additional details might help us identify the root cause of the issue so we can work towards finding an effective solution as soon as possible. We value our customers like you greatly and will do everything in our power to get things back up and running smoothly again for you by tomorrow if at all feasible.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my <PRODUCT>, which I purchased just three weeks ago with order number <ORDER_ID>. Despite following the support team's advice to update my drivers last week, I'm still experiencing a significant issue with <ISSUE>. As a freelance designer, I rely on this laptop to meet my deadlines, and with a critical project due tomorrow, I urgently need a resolution to this problem. Could you please provide a concrete solution or a timeline for when I can expect this issue <ISSUE>?
